privateNameInTypeQuery.ts(21,21): error TS18013: Property '#a' is not accessible outside class 'C2' because it has a private identifier.
privateNameInTypeQuery.ts(30,15): error TS2322: Type 'string' is not assignable to type 'number'.
privateNameInTypeQuery.ts(32,21): error TS2339: Property '#b' does not exist on type 'C1'.
privateNameInTypeQuery.ts(33,28): error TS2339: Property '#a' does not exist on type 'typeof C1'.
privateNameInTypeQuery.ts(45,44): error TS2536: Type '#a' cannot be used to index type 'T'.


==== privateNameInTypeQuery.ts (5 errors) ====
    export class C1 {
        #a = 1;
    
        static #b = "";
    
        #c() {
            return 1 as const;
        }
    
        get #d() {
            return new Date();
        }
    
        ["#a"] = true;
    
        a: this[#a] = 1;
    
        test1(a: C1) {
            const b: C1[#a] = 1;
            const c: typeof a[#a] = 1;
            const d: C2[#a] = 1;
                        ~~
!!! error TS18013: Property '#a' is not accessible outside class 'C2' because it has a private identifier.
            const e: typeof C1[#b] = "";
            const f: C1["#a"] = true;
            const g: C1[#c] = this.#c;
            const h: C1[#d] = this.#d;
    
            type A = #a;
            const i: C1[A] = 1;
            const j: C1[#a | "#a"] = Math.random() ? 1 : true;
            const k: C1[#a] = "";
                  ~
!!! error TS2322: Type 'string' is not assignable to type 'number'.
    
            type B = C1[#b];
                        ~~
!!! error TS2339: Property '#b' does not exist on type 'C1'.
            type C = typeof C1[#a];
                               ~~
!!! error TS2339: Property '#a' does not exist on type 'typeof C1'.
            const l = undefined as unknown as B;
            const n = undefined as unknown as C;
    
            return [b, c, d, e, f, g, h, i, j, k, l, n];
        }
    
        test2<T extends C1>(a: T): T[#a] {
            const b: T[#a] = a.#a;
            return b;
        }
    
        test3<T extends C1 | { a: string }>(): T[#a] {
                                               ~~~~~
!!! error TS2536: Type '#a' cannot be used to index type 'T'.
            return undefined as any;
        }
    
        test4(): any[#a] {
            return "";
        }
    
        test5(): never[#a] {
            throw new Error();
        }
    }
    
    export class C2 {
        #a = 1;
    
        test1(): void {
            class C {
                test1(a: C2): typeof a[#a] {
                    return 1;
                }
            }
            new C().test1(this);
        }
    }
